rule: PatientResultInsightProjection may point at PatientResultInterpretationProjection but may not introduce a second explanation source, comparator basis, abnormality basis, trend wording, or related action set.
driftClosures: PatientResultInsightProjection naming drift closed by exported type alias and adapter
PatientResultInterpretationProjection remains the only patient-facing explanation authority
record detail API returns both resultInterpretation and resultInsight pointing at the same projection id
